creator: stefan.witzel@zvw.uni-goettingen.de
text:
Running mk-parallel-dump WITHOUT option --nogzip gives the error message

 * Cannot --gzip because the IO::Compress::Gzip module is not installed.  Install the module or specify --no-gzip.

Fix: 

Add module p5-IO-Compress-Zlib to the RUN-DEPENDS in the Makefile of the maatkit port
How-To-Repeat: Run mk-parallel-dump WITHOUT option --nogzip again
